response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion:
To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be proactive and educate yourself on how to identify and report false information. Here are some steps you can take: 
Firstly, be aware of your own biases and try to verify the sources of the information you consume. Secondly, fact-checking websites and tools can help you identify fake content quickly and efficiently. Thirdly, use privacy settings on social media platforms to control who can contact you and limit your exposure to misinformation. Lastly, engage in open and respectful conversations with others to promote critical thinking and media literacy. By taking these steps, you can help create a safer and more informed online community.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be proactive and educate oneself on how to identify and report false information. By being aware of one's own biases, fact-checking, using privacy settings, and engaging in open conversations, individuals can help create a safer and more informed online community.
